name: Organization
description: The primary business or entity implementing the privacy management framework.

name: Top Management
description: The highest level of executive leadership accountable for the success and resourcing of the management system.

name: Interested Party
description: Any internal or external individual or group affected by the organization's privacy practices and decisions.

name: PII Controller
description: An entity that determines the core purpose and the means (the 'why' and 'how') of processing personal data.

name: Joint PII Controller
description: An entity that shares the determination of data processing purposes and means with one or more other controllers.

name: PII Processor
description: A service provider or entity that processes personal data strictly on behalf of a controller.

name: Subcontractor
description: A third-party vendor engaged by a processor to assist in data processing activities.

name: Customer
description: The business or entity receiving products or services
column5: which may define contractual obligations for data processing.

name: PII Principal
description: The individual human being to whom the personal data relates.
